sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28653" key="dusama/rthtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσ-ᾰμάρτητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n28653.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">making unfortunate mistakes</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:11:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
